result.stdout:
task-runner v0.0.4

USAGE
  task <tasknames...> [options]

DESCRIPTION
  Runs a task based on the provided configuration.

PARAMETERS
  tasknames         Names of the task(s) to run. Default: .

OPTIONS
  -c|--config       Path to the task configuration file. Default: "task-runner.yaml".
  --init            Initialize the task configuration file if it does not exist. Default: "False".
  -f|--force        Force run the task(s). Default: "False".
  --list            List available tasks in the configuration file. Default: "False".
  --parallel        Run tasks in parallel if set to true. Default: "False".
  -w|--watch        Watch for file changes and re-run tasks if set to true. Default: "False".
  -h|--help         Shows help text. 
  --version         Shows version information.
